eau_du_soleil.honest_amenity_note: Best-in-class amenities for runner ER doc: full gym + spin/CrossFit zone + rooftop basketball + saltwater pool + MMA room + outdoor terraces. 24/7 concierge. Newer build (2019).

vita_on_the_lake.honest_amenity_note: Fully-equipped gym + yoga studio + outdoor pool. Soundproofing is well-reviewed (rare). Single-staff concierge sometimes unavailable. No hot tub. Outdoor pool means seasonal only.

lago_waterfront.honest_amenity_note: H2O multi-level fitness facility (strong), indoor pool, sauna, car wash, theatre. Mattamy 2017 build typical glass-tower acoustics.

markwood_4365.honest_amenity_note: Brand-new purpose-built rental (LEED Silver, geothermal). State-of-the-art fitness + yoga + co-work + movie + dog run. Suites 400-1000 sqft. Markland Wood location is far from hospitals.

arc_erin_mills.honest_amenity_note: Standout: full-court gymnasium + state-of-art fitness centre + acre-sized courtyard with running/biking track. Indoor pool. Daniels build quality. Perfect for runner.

reid_drive.honest_amenity_note: Older 8-storey purpose-built rental. Basic on-site fitness. Outdoor parking only. Renovated suites. No central AC, no in-suite laundry.

lakewood_ii_1285.honest_amenity_note: 7-storey 1970s building. Has on-site fitness but basic. Coin laundry. Parquet floors. Outdoor parking primary. Heat/water included.

lakeshore_2335.honest_amenity_note: 1967 8-storey, 132 units. Renovated suites with stone counters. No gym, no concierge. Coin laundry. Parking $100 indoor / $75 outdoor. Cheap-and-cheerful.

lakeshore_2495.honest_amenity_note: MetCap-managed, 1960s building. Renovated suites, vinyl flooring. Coin laundry only. No gym/concierge. Heat included. Bare-bones amenity profile.

lakeshore_206e.honest_amenity_note: 4-storey 52-unit in Port Credit. Renovated suites with SS appliances + dishwasher. Garage parking. No gym. 10-min walk to GO.

waterford_tower_2645.honest_amenity_note: Solid QuadReal purpose-built rental. In-suite laundry + central AC + solarium. State-of-art fitness + seasonal pool + sauna. Located Meadowvale (further from CVH).

143_stephen_drive.honest_amenity_note: Tiny 4-storey 31-unit MetCap walk-up. Heat/water included. No gym, no concierge, coin laundry. Cheapest option in Stonegate-Queensway.

65_windermere.honest_amenity_note: Greenwin 1962 6-storey 92-unit CRB-certified. Parquet floors. Surface parking + 25 bike spots (good for cyclist). No gym, no in-suite laundry. Walk to High Park.

60_mountview.honest_amenity_note: 1965 16-storey Beaux Properties. Outdoor pool + bike storage + on-site variety store. No gym, coin laundry. Underground + outdoor parking. Near Junction subway.

70_high_park_ave.honest_amenity_note: Daniels 2005 build, 20 floors, 169 suites. Has exercise room (modest, not full), party + theatre + billiards. 24h security/concierge. Many lake/park view units. Sublet only.

grenadier_square.honest_amenity_note: 1965 twin-towers GWLR (modernized). Standout for older building: fitness centre + indoor pool + dog park + music room + games room. No in-suite laundry but solid amenity refresh.

the_campbell.honest_amenity_note: Toronto's Best New Rental 2024. 18-storey, 235 units. Full fitness studio + games + coffee shop + co-work + pet spa + library on ground floor. Junction Triangle, far from CVH but excellent build.

old_mill_station_2675.honest_amenity_note: Closest match: Terraces of Old Mill 2662 Bloor, 2002 build. Concierge + gym + indoor pool + sauna + rooftop deck. Old Mill TTC at door. Verify exact 2675 address as it may not exist.

concord_canada_house.honest_amenity_note: Canada's tallest residential amenity club. 71F SkyGym, 82F SkyLounge, pool/hot tub/cold plunge, spin zone, yoga. Brand new 82-storey 1397-unit. CityPlace = downtown, 45+ min to CVH.

liberty_house.honest_amenity_note: Brand-new 25-storey 440-unit purpose-built rental. Outdoor rooftop infinity pool + fitness + dry sauna + yoga/spin room + outdoor putting green. Liberty Village, far from CVH.

dna3_lofts.honest_amenity_note: Canderel loft-style 2015, 605 units. Full gym + yoga/aerobics + rain room with spa beds + rooftop terrace + misting sundeck. 24h concierge. Loft acoustics = some noise transfer.

m5v_condos.honest_amenity_note: Lifetime Developments LEED Gold 2011. 34-storey, 305 suites. Fully equipped fitness + steam rooms + yoga/pilates studio + sundeck. Entertainment District nightlife = street noise possible.

king_charlotte.honest_amenity_note: 2016 32-storey 232-unit. Outdoor pool + gym (modest) + rooftop deck + concierge. King West nightlife = noise on lower floors. Smaller building so amenity rooms can be busy.

pinnacle_grand_park_ii.honest_amenity_note: Pinnacle 2018, 48-storey 469-unit. Gym + indoor pool + hot tub + sauna + yoga studio + co-work + 24h concierge. Square One area. Solid amenity package for the price.

ultra_ovation.honest_amenity_note: Tridel 2010, 32-storey 297-unit. Access to 30,000 sqft Ovation Club: indoor pool + hot tub + virtual golf + multiple exercise rooms + party room. One of best amenity packages in Mississauga.

sherwood_towers.honest_amenity_note: 1983 20-storey 161-unit. Excellent amenities for age: indoor pool + gym + squash court + sauna + outdoor tennis court + BBQ terrace. Larger floor plans (2BR+ solarium to 4BR). Great for runner.

the_crossways.honest_amenity_note: 1977 twin 29-storey towers. Individually controlled HVAC. On-site 85,000 sqft mall (groceries, banks). No standout fitness. Coin laundry. Aging but functional. Bloor/Dundas transit hub.

junction_factory.honest_amenity_note: Terra Firma 2022 boutique 7-storey 141-unit. Gym + yoga studio + pet spa + EV charging + business centre + party room. Suites 400-1200 sqft. Realstar managed. Newer build with quality finishes.

beechwood_480.honest_amenity_note: Older Port Credit walk-up. Coin laundry on main. Heat/water/hydro included. Outdoor parking $80. NO pets. No gym, no concierge. Close to Lakefront Trails.

brightwater_i.honest_amenity_note: Brand-new Diamond Corp/Dundee Kilmer 2024 master-planned. Gym + co-working + concierge + complimentary shuttle to Port Credit GO. Connected to 14 acres of waterfront parks. Lower-rise (5 floors).
